features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You gain two Eldritch Invocations of your choice. These include options like Pact of the Blade, Pact of the Chain, and Pact of the Tome, which were previously separate Pact Boon features.

features.name: Spellcasting (Pact Magic)
features.description: You prepare a fixed number of spells from the Warlock spell list. Charisma is your spellcasting ability. Your spell slots are all of the same level and regain on a Short or Long Rest.

features.name: Magical Cunning
features.description: Once per day, you can spend 1 minute to regain half of your expended Pact Magic spell slots (rounded up).

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You gain another Eldritch Invocation.

features.name: Warlock Subclass
features.description: You choose your Otherworldly Patron subclass. You gain features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You gain another Eldritch Invocation.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen patron.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You gain another Eldritch Invocation.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Contact Patron
features.description: You can cast the Contact Other Plane spell once per Long Rest without spending a spell slot to consult your patron. you automatically succeed on the Intelligence saving throw.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You gain another Eldritch Invocation.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen patron.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th level)
features.description: Your patron bestows upon you a magical secret called an arcanum. Choose one 6th-level spell from the warlock spell list as this arcanum. You can cast your arcanum spell once without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You gain another Eldritch Invocation.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (7th level)
features.description: You choose one 7th-level spell from the warlock spell list as an arcanum, which you can cast once per Long Rest.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen patron.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (8th level)
features.description: You choose one 8th-level spell from the warlock spell list as an arcanum, which you can cast once per Long Rest.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You gain another Eldritch Invocation.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (9th level)
features.description: You choose one 9th-level spell from the warlock spell list as an arcanum, which you can cast once per Long Rest.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You gain another Eldritch Invocation.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.description: You gain an Epic Boon feat of your choice.

features.name: Eldritch Master
features.description: You can use your Magical Cunning feature any number of times per day.
